import React, { useState } from 'react'; import StatCard from '../components/StatCard'; const Customers = () => { const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState('all'); const dealers = [ { id: 'DLR-001', name: 'Metro Motors', city: 'New Delhi', type: 'dealer', orders: 48, volume: '₹2.1Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2024-01-15' }, { id: 'DLR-002', name: 'Royal Rides', city: 'Mumbai', type: 'distributor', orders: 62, volume: '₹3.8Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2023-08-22' }, { id: 'DLR-003', name: 'Speed Hub', city: 'Bangalore', type: 'dealer', orders: 35, volume: '₹1.5Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2024-06-10' }, { id: 'DLR-004', name: 'KTM Zone', city: 'Pune', type: 'dealer', orders: 28, volume: '₹1.2Cr', status: 'pending', joined: '2025-01-05' }, { id: 'DLR-005', name: 'Bike World', city: 'Hyderabad', type: 'distributor', orders: 55, volume: '₹2.8Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2023-11-18' }, { id: 'DLR-006', name: 'Honda Hub', city: 'Chennai', type: 'dealer', orders: 42, volume: '₹1.9Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2024-03-20' }, { id: 'DLR-007', name: 'Ride Nation', city: 'Jaipur', type: 'dealer', orders: 22, volume: '₹0.9Cr', status: 'verified', joined: '2025-02-01' }, { id: 'DLR-008', name: 'Moto Express', city: 'Kolkata', type: 'distributor', orders: 38, volume: '₹2.0Cr', status: 'pending', joined: '2024-09-12' }, ]; const types = ['all', 'dealer', 'distributor']; const filteredDealers = filterType === 'all' ? dealers : dealers.filter(d => d.type === filterType); return (

); }; export default Customers;
